name: Little Apples Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the butter, sugar, brown sugar, molasses, corn syrup, cinnamon, and ginger. Cook over moderate heat until the temperature reaches 280°F on a candy thermometer.
2. Pour the mixture over popped popcorn, chopped walnuts, and dried apples cut into small pieces.
3. Shape the mixture into balls.
